posts.text:
The funny thing here is, if we take you at your word, you’re basing all of your constant commentary on this situation on an objectively wrong understanding of what happened that could be corrected by watching the video all of the rest of us watched. 

I think it’s more likely that you’re just lying, but either way it’s astounding.
